content: Dhruv Tomar. Applied AI Engineer, Agentic AI Architect, AI Solutions Consultant. Brand: AIwithDhruv (5.4K+ LinkedIn). Email: aiwithdhruv@gmail.com / dhruv70081@gmail.com. Phone: +91 8770101822. LinkedIn: linkedin.com/in/aiwithdhruv. YouTube: youtube.com/@aiwithdhruv. GitHub: github.com/aiagentwithdhruv. Based in India. One-man-army: builds entire production AI systems solo. Rare combo: deep AI/automation technical skills + enterprise sales acumen + ships real products. Thinks like a consultant, builds like an engineer, delivers like a product owner. North Star: Financial freedom + high-leverage life. 5-10 year vision: ₹50+ Crore wealth, multiple SaaS products, known name in AI space, calm controlled lifestyle.

AI Engineer at Onsite (Abeyaantrix Technology PVT LTD). Construction Management SaaS. CTC ~20 LPA (fixed + variable + consulting). 3+ years. Built: 4 LangGraph AI agents for 20 sales reps, 210+ n8n workflows, RAG knowledge assistant, voice AI agents, quotation generator. Impact: 0→10 Cr ARR, 60-70% cost reduction, 15+ hrs/week saved per person, 31% reply rate. Team: 10 sales reps + 3 pre-sales (Jyoti 131 demos/mo, Shruti 71, Chadni 39). Revenue: ~Rs 31.9L/month flat. Bottleneck: pre-sales capacity, NOT lead supply. Growth levers: trial revival (936 leads = Rs 21L), pipeline revival (2,151 VHP/HP), Google Ads fix, conversion 14%→18%.

topic: Product: QuotaHit — Autonomous AI Sales Department
content: QuotaHit (quotahit.com). Autonomous AI Sales Department SaaS. Stack: Next.js 16 + React 19 + Supabase + Stripe + Inngest + Twilio. 43 pages, 70+ API routes, 51 database tables, 7 AI agents (Scout, Researcher, Qualifier, Outreach, Caller, Closer, Ops). Pricing: $297/$697/$1,497 per month. FEATURE COMPLETE — NO MORE FEATURES until 10 paying customers. Revenue: $0. Target: $1M ARR (105 customers at $697/mo). Daily blog engine running (~$1.80/mo). Operating cost: $28-38/month. CRITICAL RULE: Stop building, start selling. Focus on distribution: LinkedIn, cold outreach, Upwork, Fiverr, content marketing.

topic: Product: Angelina AI — Personal AI Operating System
content: Angelina AI is ME — Dhruv's personal AI OS. Deployed on Vercel. Next.js 14 + PostgreSQL + pgvector. 25+ models across 7 providers (OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, Groq, Perplexity, Moonshot, OpenRouter). Real-time voice via GPT-4o Realtime API (~300ms latency). 16+ tools: email, calendar, GitHub, web search, tasks, goals, memory, n8n, MCP, Twilio calling, YouTube analytics, Wikipedia, Hacker News. Persistent memory with pgvector semantic search (500-entry cap). 5-tier cost-aware model routing. Telegram bot integration with daily digest. Self-healing errors, approval gates, conversation compaction. This is the FUTURE central hub — will handle everything via MCP.

content: Euron (euron.one). AI API Gateway: Euri API with 24 models, 6 providers, 200K free tokens/day. AI Courses: Architect Mastery (finetuning), Gen AI 2.0 (8 MCP servers). Future-Proof AI Automation Bootcamp starting March 8, 2026 — Sat & Sun 8-10 PM IST, ~4.5 months (19 weeks), Rs 5,000 or included in Euron Plus. 8 Phases, 19 Weeks, 18+ deployed projects. LAUNCHED Feb 22, 2026. Target: $20K-$100K in 90 days. 8 revenue channels: (1) Upwork — project $3K-$10K, 1-2 weeks; (2) Fiverr — productized $200-$2K, 3-7 days; (3) LinkedIn — high-ticket $5K-$50K, 2-4 weeks; (4) Hackathons — prizes $3.5K-$80K, 2-4 weeks; (5) Digital Products — passive $29-$999, 3-5 days setup; (6) Indian Market — B2B Rs 50K-3L, 1-3 weeks; (7) Agency Partnerships — recurring $2K-$10K/mo, 2-4 weeks; (8) Voice AI Services — high-margin $3K-$6K/mo, 78-89% margins. Major projects in /Volumes/Dhruv_SSD/AIwithDhruv/Claude/: QuotaHit (SaaS), Onsite (sales intelligence), Euron (API + courses), angelina-vercel-clean (AI OS), Angelina AI System (design docs + personas), OpenClaw (VPS agent), Smart AI Chat (knowledge assistant), Live Sales Coach (Gemini hackathon), SalesForge Agent (Elasticsearch hackathon), 90-Day Revenue Engine (strategy), Business-Partners (Malavika), Clients/ (9 projects), Agent-Loadouts (MCP + CLI + schemas), .context/claude-skills (29 skills + 4 agents). Claude Code: $200/month Max plan. Cursor: exhausted. Gamma: ₹600 active. Waalaxy: paid, active. n8n: self-hosted (free). Vercel: free tier. Supabase: free tier. Total tools: ~₹25-30K invested. API costs: QuotaHit ~$28-38/mo, Angelina ~$10-40/mo. Revenue from products: still $0. But 90-Day Revenue Engine is targeting $20K-$100K. Money-first mindset: distribution > building features.

Speed over polish. Action over discussion. Give answers, not options. Short responses unless depth needed. Never say 'Great question!' — just do the work. Bias towards action. Challenge when wrong, but with data. Uses markdown tables for comparisons. Separates probabilistic AI (decisions) from deterministic code (execution). Reuse before rebuild — always check skills library first. Money-first: distribution > features. Call him 'Dhruv' or 'Boss'. Tone: casual professional, like a trusted co-founder.

Agentic AI: LangGraph, LangChain, CrewAI, multi-agent orchestration. LLMs: Claude, GPT-4o, Gemini, Grok, Perplexity, multi-provider routing. RAG: embeddings, pgvector, Pinecone, cosine similarity, NLQ. Backend: Python, FastAPI, Node.js, TypeScript. Frontend: React 19, Next.js 14-16, TypeScript, Tailwind CSS v4. Database: PostgreSQL, Supabase, MongoDB. Voice AI: GPT-4o Realtime API, ElevenLabs, Deepgram, Twilio, Vapi. Automation: n8n (210+ workflows), webhooks, event-driven. DevOps: AWS, Railway, Vercel, Docker, Modal, LangSmith.

topic: Key Decision: Feature Freeze on QuotaHit
content: CRITICAL DECISION (Feb 2026): QuotaHit is FEATURE COMPLETE. No more building until 10 paying customers. Only 4 things worth adding: (1) Shareable scores (viral loop), (2) Onboarding flow (reduce drop-off), (3) Stripe checkout (payments), (4) Usage limits (free tier control). Everything else: DISTRIBUTION. If Dhruv talks about adding features, remind him of this rule.
